conbody.p: This section provides information about issues that were resolved in release 24.1.

section.title: Resolved Issues in Juniper Cloud-Native Router Release 24.1

ul.li: JCNR-5627: IPv6 traffic limitation on IRB interface—Previously, JCNR did not allow IPv6 packets with size over 1490 bytes through an IRB interface. This limitation no longer exists and IPv6 packets with size 1518 bytes can be successfully transmitted through an IRB interface.
JCNR-5621: [ECMP] Flow stickiness not working for SR-MPLS ECMP—Previously, flow stickiness for IPv6 traffic with SR-MPLS was not functional. This issue is now fixed.
